ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculty_staff" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty/staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty/staff member */,
  "title" TEXT /* Primary professional title */,
  "secondary_title" TEXT /* Secondary title or affiliation */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keywords representing areas of expertise */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing faculty/staff */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the faculty/staff member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the faculty/staff member */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date when the faculty/staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the faculty/staff member left the university */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the profile picture of the faculty/staff member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the faculty/staff member */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the faculty/staff member (e.g., active, on leave, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_staff_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location or building of the department */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the department was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head FOREIGN KEY ("department_head") REFERENCES faculty_staff ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Keyword name */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated faculty/staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_staff ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Tag name */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated faculty/staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_staff ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "secondary_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each secondary title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Title name */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated faculty/staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_secondary_titles_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_staff ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_staff_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty/staff member being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the information */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the information (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_staff_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_staff_access_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_staff ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, student) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
